channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ADANIENT] Adani Airport City incorporates 3 new real estate subsidiaries
item.description:
Adani Airport City Limited, a step-down wholly owned subsidiary of Adani Enterprises Ltd, has incorporated three new wholly owned subsidiaries: Adani Navi Mumbai Airport City Limited (ANMACL), Adani Guwahati Airport City Limited (AGACL), and Adani Ahmedabad Airport City Limited (AAACL). These entities were incorporated on April 6, 2026, in India, each with a paid-up share capital of ₹10,00,000. The new subsidiaries will primarily engage in real estate activities, including development with own or leased property, construction, and operating hotels with integrated facilities. This strategic move aims to expand Adani's footprint in the real estate and hospitality sectors linked to airport infrastructure.

  • Adani Airport City Ltd, a step-down subsidiary, incorporated three new wholly-owned subsidiaries.
  • New entities are Adani Navi Mumbai, Guwahati, and Ahmedabad Airport City Limited.
  • They will focus on real estate activities, construction, and hospitality.
  • Each subsidiary has a paid-up capital of ₹10,00,000.
  • This expands Adani's presence in airport-related real estate development.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADANI ENTERPRISES LTD. | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [CEINSYSTECH] Ceinsys Tech invests USD 2.16M in US subsidiary for growth opportunities
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ceinsys Tech Ltd has further invested USD 2,161,000 (approximately ₹20.28 Crores) as fresh equity capital in its wholly-owned foreign subsidiary, Technology Associates Inc., USA. This investment, made on April 18, 2026, is part of a larger board-approved limit of up to ₹40 Crores and aims to meet funding requirements for seizing growth opportunities in the USA. Technology Associates Inc. is an unlisted subsidiary engaged in providing engineering design services, and Ceinsys Tech's shareholding remains unchanged at 100% post-investment. The transaction was a cash consideration and complied with FEMA Regulations.

  • Ceinsys Tech invested USD 2.16 million (₹20.28 Cr) in its US subsidiary.
  • The investment is fresh equity to fund growth opportunities in the USA.
  • Company's 100% shareholding in Technology Associates Inc. remains unchanged.
  • This is part of a larger board-approved investment limit of ₹40 Cr.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ceinsys Tech Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [AFFORDABLE] ARAL Board to meet Apr 27 for related party transactions, subsidiary changes
item.description:
Affordable Robotic & Automation Ltd (ARAL) has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for April 27, 2026. The agenda includes noting a term sheet executed by its subsidiary, ARAPL Raas Private Limited, and approving a subsequent reduction in ARAL's shareholding in this subsidiary. The Board will also consider and approve related party transactions, specifically up to ₹50 crores with a promoter and up to ₹100 crores with a subsidiary. Additionally, the meeting will involve approving the Notice for an Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) or a postal ballot process to seek member approval for these proposed matters.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 27, 2026.
  • To approve related party transaction with promoter up to ₹50 Cr.
  • To approve related party transaction with subsidiary up to ₹100 Cr.
  • To consider reduction in ARAPL's shareholding in subsidiary.
  • EGM/postal ballot to seek member approval for these matters.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Affordable Robotic & Automation Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [TATIAGLOB] Tatia Global Vennture Board to meet on Apr 27 for CS resignation & appointment
item.description:
Tatia Global Vennture Ltd has scheduled its Board of Directors meeting for April 27, 2026. The agenda includes noting the resignation of Mr. Madhur Agarwal as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, effective April 30, 2026. The board will also consider and approve the proposed appointment of Mr. Apurv Maheshwari as the new Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, effective May 1, 2026. Additionally, the board will review compliances for the quarter/year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 27, 2026.
  • To consider resignation of Company Secretary Mr. Madhur Agarwal.
  • To approve appointment of Mr. Apurv Maheshwari as new CS.
  • Review of compliances for Q4/FY26 also on agenda.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TATIA GLOBAL VENNTURE LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ELANTAS] Elantas Beck India to hold 70th AGM on May 12, 2026
item.description:
Elantas Beck India Ltd. announced its 70th Annual General Meeting (AGM) will be held on Tuesday, May 12, 2026, at 10:30 a.m. (IST) via Video Conferencing/Other Audio-Visual Means. The company has submitted its Annual Report for the year ended 2025, along with the AGM Notice, to members electronically. The Annual Report also includes the Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report (BRSR) for the year ended December 31, 2025. Key dates include a cut-off date for e-voting on May 5, 2026, e-voting period from May 9-11, 2026, and a record date for dividend payment of ₹7.50 per equity share on May 5, 2026. The dividend, if declared, will be paid on or before June 10, 2026.

  • 70th Annual General Meeting (AGM) scheduled for May 12, 2026.
  • AGM will be conducted virtually via Video Conferencing/OAVM.
  • Annual Report 2025 and BRSR for 2025 have been submitted.
  • Record date for ₹7.50 per share dividend is May 5, 2026.
  • Dividend payment, if declared, by June 10, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ELANTAS BECK INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [JK AGRI] JK Agri Genetics: Income Tax Order disallows ₹1.5 Cr R&D, ₹0.52 Cr demand
item.description:
JK Agri Genetics Ltd received an order from the Income Tax Authority under Section 250 of the Income Tax Act, 1961, dated April 17, 2026. This order pertains to the Financial Year 2017-18, where the company had initially faced a disallowance of ₹9.89 crore (weighted deduction on R&D expenses) with a tax impact of ₹3.42 crore due to non-receipt of Form 3CL. Following an appeal, the Department of Scientific and Industrial Research (DSIR) later disallowed only ₹1.50 crore related to outsourced labour expenses, issuing Form 3CL accordingly. The Commissioner of Income Tax (Appeals) has now passed an order confirming the disallowance of ₹1.50 crore, resulting in a demand of ₹0.52 crore (plus interest). The company states this demand will be adjusted against available MAT credit, ensuring no cash outflow. JK Agri Genetics plans to file an appeal against this order before the Income Tax Appellate Tribunal (ITAT) within 60 days.

  • Income Tax Appeal order received for FY2017-18 disallowing R&D expenses.
  • Disallowance of ₹1.50 crore for R&D labour expenses confirmed by CIT (Appeals).
  • Resulting demand of ₹0.52 crore to be adjusted against available MAT credit.
  • No immediate cash outflow expected from the tax demand.
  • Company intends to file an appeal with the ITAT against the order.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JK Agri Genetics Ltd | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [GOGIACAP] Gogia Capital: Simarjeet Baweja appointed Chairperson; committees revised
item.description:
Gogia Capital Growth Ltd issued a revised outcome of its Board Meeting held on April 18, 2026, to correct an inadvertent error in the previous filing regarding the Chairperson's name. The Board noted the resignation of Mrs. Aanal Mehta, Independent Director, from the Chairmanship of the Audit Committee and Stakeholders Relationship Committee, effective April 18, 2026. Consequently, the Board approved a new constitution for these committees, with Mr. Brijesh Saxena now chairing the Audit and Stakeholders Relationship Committees, and Mr. Rajat Raja Kothari chairing the NRC. Crucially, Mr. Simarjeet Singh Baweja, a Non-Executive Director, has been appointed as the new Chairperson of the Company, effective April 18, 2026, correcting the earlier erroneous mention of Mr. Brijesh Saxena.

  • Gogia Capital corrected the Chairperson's name in a revised board outcome.
  • Mr. Simarjeet Singh Baweja appointed as the new Company Chairperson.
  • Mrs. Aanal Mehta resigned as Chair of Audit and Stakeholders Relationship Committees.
  • Board committees (Audit, NRC, SRC) were re-constituted with new chairpersons.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gogia Capital Services Limited | Category: Management Change

item.title: [ELANTAS] Elantas Beck India Submits FY25 Business Responsibility & Sustainability Report
item.description:
Elantas Beck India Ltd has submitted its Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report (BRSR) for the financial year ended December 2025, in compliance with SEBI regulations. The report, which forms part of the company's Annual Report, details its operations and sustainability efforts. The company's main activity is the manufacturing of speciality chemicals, accounting for 100% of its turnover, with electrical insulations contributing 81% and engineering/electronic resins 19%. The report also notes that exports constituted approximately 1% of the total turnover for FY2025. The BRSR was prepared on a standalone basis and is available on the company's website.

  • Submitted Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report for FY2025.
  • Speciality chemicals account for 100% of the company's turnover.
  • Electrical insulations contribute 81% of total turnover.
  • Exports represented 1% of total turnover for FY2025.
  • The BRSR was prepared on a standalone basis.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ELANTAS BECK INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: ESG

item.title: [ELANTAS] Elantas Beck India to hold 70th AGM on May 12, 2026; proposes ₹7.50 dividend
item.description:
Elantas Beck India Ltd will hold its 70th Annual General Meeting (AGM) on Tuesday, May 12, 2026, at 10:30 a.m. IST via Video Conferencing/OAVM. Key agenda items include the adoption of audited financial statements for the year ended December 31, 2025, and the declaration of a dividend of ₹7.50 per equity share for the same period. The meeting will also address the re-appointment of Mr. Ravindra Kumar as a Director and the appointment of M S K A & Associates LLP as Statutory Auditors for a five-year term. Additionally, members will ratify the remuneration for the Cost Auditors, Dhananjay V. Joshi & Associates, for FY2025, not exceeding ₹2,00,000.

  • 70th Annual General Meeting scheduled for May 12, 2026, via VC/OAVM.
  • Board proposes a dividend of ₹7.50 per equity share for FY2025.
  • Re-appointment of Mr. Ravindra Kumar as a Director is on the agenda.
  • M S K A & Associates LLP to be appointed as Statutory Auditors for 5 years.
  • Remuneration of Cost Auditors for FY2025 to be ratified, not exceeding ₹2,00,000.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ELANTAS BECK INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [AUBANK] AU Bank: Uttam Tibrewal steps down as Whole Time Director
item.description:
AU Small Finance Bank Ltd announced that Mr. Uttam Tibrewal completed his tenure as Whole Time Director and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) from the close of business hours on April 18, 2026. He will, however, continue in his capacity as Deputy Chief Executive Officer (Deputy CEO) of the Bank. In this ongoing role, Mr. Tibrewal will lead the Bank’s retail business verticals, with an increased focus on on-ground engagement to drive growth, strengthen customer relationships, and expand the Bank’s presence into new geographies. He will also continue to be categorized as Senior Management Personnel (SMP) of the Bank.

  • Uttam Tibrewal's tenure as Whole Time Director ended April 18, 2026.
  • He ceases to be a Whole Time Director and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP).
  • He will continue as Deputy CEO, leading the Bank’s retail business verticals.
  • His focus will be on driving growth, strengthening customer relationships, and expansion.
  • Mr. Tibrewal remains categorized as Senior Management Personnel (SMP).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AU Small Finance Bank Ltd | Category: Management Change
